evidence.snippet: Blue UAS Framework companion computer with built-in PX4/Ardupilot flight controller that enables smaller, smarter, and safer drones and robots
VOXL® 2 Next Generation Blue UAS 2.0 Autonomous AI Autopilot

items.notes: VOXL 2 and VOXL 2 Mini are AI autopilot companion computers with integrated PX4/ArduPilot flight controllers; Flight Core v2 is a dedicated PX4 flight controller.

evidence.snippet:
High Performance 4-in-1 Electronic Speed Controller
---------------------------------------------------
This high-performance ESC supports over 300A burst current using 100A MOSFETs per channel. Communicate reliably with low-latency digital UART from your flight controller to your 4-in-1 ESC. This ESC is designed, built and tested in the USA and is NDAA '20 Section 848 compliant.

items.notes: VOXL ESC FPV and VOXL ESC Mini are US-assembled 4-in-1 ESCs compatible with PX4/VOXL 2.

evidence.snippet:
Onboard VIO for Autonomous Navigation
Starling 2 and VOXL SDK accelerate the development of GPS-denied navigation, AI and flight for sUAS

*   15 TOPS AI embedded Neural Processing Unit (NPU)
*   Integrated flight controller on DSP with TDK® ICM-42688 IMU and ICP-10111 Barometer

items.notes: VOXL 2 includes onboard IMU; ModalAI sells dedicated image sensor modules for VIO/GPS-denied navigation.
ELRS 915MHz Gemini Receiver (M0184), VOXL Microhard Modem, MVX FPV Video Receiver (VRX) - data links, radios, FPV video.

ModalAI® accelerates autonomy by providing innovators with robot and drone perception and communications systems that are manufactured in the U.S.A. Our highly-integrated AI-powered modules empower a variety of industries to utilize aerial and ground autonomous navigations systems that communicate on 4G and 5G cellular networks. drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Primary business is selling VOXL 2 autopilot/companion computer to OEM drone makers (Inspired Flight, Cleo Robotics, XTEND, Corvus Drones all integrate VOXL). Also produces complete FPV drones (Stinger/Seeker Vision FPV) and a reference drone (Starling 2 Max).

evidence.snippet:
Commitment to NDAA Compliance
-----------------------------
ModalAI offers a collection of autopilots, accessories, and development drones as part of the Blue UAS program. All of which comply with the following:

*   #### NDAA Compliant
    *   FY 2024 NDAA, Sections 1823-1833
    *   FY 2023 NDAA, Section 817
    *   FY 2020 NDAA, Section 848

Stinger Vision FPV and Seeker Vision FPV (5" and 7") are now on the Blue UAS Cleared list.
Both variants of Seeker Vision FPV are now available to government customers through ADS, Inc, CHS6 and can be purchased via P-card by reaching out at **[modalai.com](https://www.modalai.com/pages/blue-uas-cleared-fpv-customer-intake-form "https://www.modalai.com/pages/blue-uas-cleared-fpv-customer-intake-form")[](https://www.modalai.com/pages/blue-uas-cleared-fpv-customer-intake-form "https://www.modalai.com/pages/blue-uas-cleared-fpv-customer-intake-form")**.

*   #### Blue UAS Cleared
    *   Avionics US-made by ModalAI
    *   VTX US-made by ModalAI
    *   VRX w/ HDMI Output US-made by ModalAI
    *   Built around Blue UAS Framework components

blue_uas.notes: Stinger Vision FPV and Seeker Vision FPV (5" and 7") are on the DIU Blue UAS Cleared List. VOXL 2 is listed as a Blue UAS Framework component.

tagline: San Diego-based maker of autonomous flight control systems (VOXL 2, VOXL 2 Mini autopilots) and Blue UAS–cleared FPV drones (Stinger Vision, Seeker Vision). Also supplies ESCs, vision sensors, and communications modules for drone integration. NDAA-compliant, production-ready. Strong ecosystem ties (PX4, Qualcomm, ROS). Limited public evidence of major defense prime contracts; marketing emphasizes commercial/developer use cases.
